title: Frontend Batch 35 - Public Admin Affordance Route Rendering Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced public route rendering when admin affordance session checks fail so authored public content remains visible, admin affordances stay hidden, and raw auth/backend details do not leak.

validation.command: npx skills find nextjs public route rendering admin affordance testing
validation.notes: Results were general Next.js/accessibility skills; no new skill was installed.
Initial failure was a missing waitFor import in the new test. Final focused route/gate run passed with 2 files and 16 tests.

remainingGaps: Browser cookie/session transitions across full page reloads remain better suited to Playwright once Docker/backend e2e is available.
Public list create affordance routing can receive a final smoke reinforcement if Batch 36 remains Vitest-only.
Full e2e needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 36 - Final Public Admin Affordance Smoke Reinforcement.
